title: Information Session 2: 2027–28 QM-Jerome Foundation Fellowship for Emerging Artists
description: This Information Session will provide an overview of the 2027-28 Queens Museum-Jerome Foundation Fellowship for Emerging Artists and provide information about the eligibility requirements and the fellowship experience. We’ll discuss the details of the program, now in its eighth cycle. You’ll have the opportunity to participate in a Q+A with QM staff for all fellowship, application, and experience questions.

venue.name: Queens Museum
venue.address: New York City Building, Flushing Meadows Corona Park, Queens, NY 11368
